_comment: Ahrena MCP: Figma server config. Stays on npx (lex-mcp §5 tier 3) — Figma does not publish an official remote HTTP endpoint nor a standalone binary today. Node.js is therefore a lazy dependency installed on demand by mcp_enable.py via the preflight (bin:node). For local-only Figma Dev Mode (requires Figma desktop running), the alternative endpoint http://127.0.0.1:3845/sse is documented in codex-mcp-figma. Merged into platform MCP files during install.
